title: Know Your Immigration Options
description: Understanding your specific immigration pathways and timeline is critical during uncertainty.
items: Confirm your I-140 status and priority date - this determines your GC queue position
Understand the 60-day grace period rule for H1B after job loss
Know transfer options: new H1B sponsor, H4 EAD if spouse eligible, F-1 if in school
Know what voluntary departure vs removal order means for future re-entry - significant difference
